final:
module top_module (
        input x,
        input y,
        input z,
  wire temp1_( ~x & ~y & z ) |
           ( ~x & y & z ) |
           ( x & ~y & ~z ) = ( ~x & ~y & z ) |
           ( ~x & y & z ) |
           ( x & ~y & ~z );
  wire temp2_( x & y & ~z ) = ( x & y & ~z );
  assign f = temp1_( ~x & ~y & z ) |
           ( ~x & y & z ) |
           ( x & ~y & ~z ) | temp2_( x & y & ~z ) ;

endmodule
